rulings.Case Title: MARY NICHOLS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 8, 2017, line 1. Plaintiff'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction continued to August 14, 2017 per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WAN FEN TAN VS. RICARDO IAN SUMMERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Amount Of Bond For Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 8, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT RICARDO SUMMERS, ALEJANDRO GOMEZ's Motion To Set Amount Of Bond For Appeal DENIED without prejudice. No admissible evidence provided by the parties for the Court to use in determination of the bond amount. Should a motion be filed again the evidence submitted shall include (not limited to), amount of mortgage, insurance, utilities, management fees, referee fees, maintenance costs, etc. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT EICHHORN VS. GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 8, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL, MR. WONG's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings continued to June 8, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than May 19, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER GARCIA VS. DAVID O' KEEFFE AND KARI O'KEEFFE, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Ensuring Victor Makras Deposition Will Not Go Forward On April 6 2016 And Will Be Moved Pursuant To A Reasonable Agreement By The Parties Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Daniel Berko
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 8, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT G. MAKRAS' Motion For Protective Order Ensuring Victor Makras Deposition Will Not Go Forward On April 6 2016 And Will Be Moved Pursuant To A Reasonable Agreement By The Parties Hearing Required to address why a discovery referee should not be appointed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HELENA NONG VS. MARIO ROSALES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 8, 2017, line 5. PLAINTIFF HELENA NONG's Amended Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file. CRC 3.1300(c). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERMAN HOLLAND VS. PATRICIA THAXTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 8, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT PATRICIA THAXTON Motion For Attorney'S Fees GRANTED in the amount of $1,375 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant is the prevailing party and is entitled to recovery of attorney's fees per the operative Lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TOMMY LEE VS. HERMAN BANKS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 8, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT HERMAN BANKS' DEMURRER to COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
